blocker: Websets MCP is visible in this Codex session, and the user-provided Exa key is configured. Direct Websets API verification still returned 401: the key's Exa team does not have Websets API access and needs an Exa Pro/API-enabled plan.
required_before_creation: enable Websets API access for the current Exa team/API key
run shadow sample before production sends
verification: Codex MCP entries are enabled; direct GET to the Websets API returned 401 for plan/access, not missing local configuration.
creation_policy: create Websets only after plan approval and after Websets API access succeeds

proposed_websets.query: Founder-led B2B teams, AI GTM teams, GTM engineering teams, and outbound agencies using signal-based outbound, Clay, Apollo, Smartlead, AI SDRs, or account brief workflows where ICP theory and reply learning must persist across batches.
criteria: B2B company or agency
visible GTM/outbound/sales engineering motion
recent signal from hiring, launch, post, or public workflow
buyer persona can be identified

proposed_websets.query: Customer-success, FDE, onboarding, solutions, implementation, and customer ops teams at knowledge-heavy B2B companies where customer context lives across calls, Slack, docs, tickets, and email.
criteria: customer-delivery workflow visible
team sells or implements a non-trivial product/service
recent hiring, case study, docs, implementation, or customer proof signal
CS/FDE/onboarding buyer can be identified

proposed_websets.query: Engineering-heavy startups, devtools companies, MCP/plugin builders, coding-agent products, and AI platform teams using Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, agents, or MCP where project context and decisions must persist across sessions.
criteria: public agent/devtools/MCP/coding workflow signal
active engineering product
technical buyer can be identified
live source URL exists

proposed_websets.query: Remote or meeting-heavy product, support, community, CS, or founder-led teams using Slack, Fathom, Fireflies, Granola, Linear, or Notion where team and agent context is fragmented across meetings and messages.
criteria: meeting-heavy or remote-work signal
customer/product/support workflow visible
public tool/workflow signal
operator buyer can be identified

proposed_websets.query: Early-stage AI and B2B founders or operators using agents, Slack, meetings, Linear, Notion, Claude, Codex, or Cursor where customer promises, investor context, hiring, and product priorities are fragmented across tools.
criteria: early-stage AI or B2B company
founder or operator owns multiple workstreams
public signal shows agent usage, context fragmentation, rapid growth, or cross-functional coordination load
founder/operator buyer can be identified

proposed_websets.query: B2B product, product ops, customer research, support-product, or product marketing teams with visible customer feedback, docs churn, changelog velocity, support themes, or roadmap activity where customer language and decisions need to persist across tools.
criteria: product or customer-insight workflow visible
team has repeated customer touchpoints
recent signal around feedback, roadmap, support, docs, or customer learning
product/customer-insight buyer can be identified

proposed_websets.query: Developer tools, AI products, open-source projects, or B2B SaaS teams with active Discord, Slack, GitHub issues, docs, support, or community workflows where repeated answers and user context need to survive across agents.
criteria: active support, devrel, open-source, or community surface
public docs, onboarding, repeated-question, issue, or community-growth signal
support/community owner can be identified

proposed_websets.query: Companies hiring internal AI, AI automation, platform, AI enablement, RevOps automation, or agent workflow roles where internal agents need approved company context, rules, handoffs, and decisions across tools.
criteria: visible internal AI, automation, platform, or agent workflow initiative
buyer or owner can be identified
signal shows agents or automation crossing tools or teams

proposed_websets.query: Vertical AI app builders in legal, healthcare, finance, real estate, procurement, recruiting, education, or customer operations where user or team memory, personalization, long-running workflows, or agent context persistence is part of the product experience.
criteria: building an AI product in a vertical workflow
user or team memory is plausibly part of the product experience
public signal around personalization, user history, agents, memory, or long-running workflows

proposed_websets.query: Founder-led distribution teams, devrel teams, content operators, community-led growth teams, or product marketers with frequent launches, technical blogs, customer stories, webinars, podcasts, or community activity where market language and voice need to persist across tools.
criteria: public content, devrel, launch, founder-led writing, or community-led growth motion
team has repeated source material from customers, community, docs, or launches
buyer or sender can be identified

proposed_websets.query: AI researchers, analysts, consultants, strategy teams, legal or finance operators, and high-context independent experts using AI, notebooks, source-heavy workflows, or knowledge systems where reasoning chains, sources, decisions, and open questions must persist across sessions.
criteria: high-context long-running source-heavy work is visible
person or team uses AI, agents, notebooks, research workflows, or knowledge tools
public signal is specific enough to avoid generic knowledge-worker targeting

proposed_websets.query: AI agencies, GTM agencies, implementation consultancies, product studios, RevOps consultancies, or solutions consulting teams serving multiple clients where client-specific context, promises, deliverables, approvals, and next actions need to persist across agents.
criteria: multi-client service or consulting model is visible
team sells AI, GTM, implementation, product, RevOps, or customer-delivery services
public case studies, client roster, service pages, or client-workflow evidence exist
